street.description: First-named street or way of the signalized location, exactly as written (whitespace-collapsed); ramp and carriageway designations stay whole (e.g. 'Boylston Street (Route 9) eastbound onramp and offramp')

cross_street.description: Second-named street or way of the intersection; named driveways and ramp designations count as ways; empty for midblock, segment, and landmark entries

additional_streets.description: Third and subsequent streets/ways of a multi-leg intersection, joined with '; ' in source order (semicolon because way names may contain commas); empty when the intersection has only two legs

signal_type.description: Kind of device: subsections (a) and (c) are traffic_signal, subsection (b) is pedestrian_hybrid_beacon

direction.description: Direction of travel the signal installation is designated for, when the entry states one as a standalone qualifier (e.g. 'Washington Street at Centre Avenue, eastbound.'); NOT filled from direction words embedded in ramp/carriageway names

from_point.description: Reference street for proximity and offset entries ('near X', 'N feet DIRECTION of X') or segment start for 'between X and Y' entries; empty for plain intersection entries

to_point.description: Segment end for 'between X and Y' entries; empty otherwise

offset_feet.description: Distance in feet from from_point when the source gives one (e.g. '70 feet east of Lawrence Avenue'); empty for 'near' entries with no stated distance

offset_direction.description: Compass direction of the offset from from_point (proposed common vocabulary: compass_point)

owner.description: Owning/operating jurisdiction when the source states one: 'state' for subsection (c) entries, 'shared with City of Boston' for the Commonwealth Avenue/Fr. Herlihy/Lake Street parenthetical; empty means not stated (city-maintained by default)

location_detail.description: Landmark or positional qualifier from the source that is not a named way (e.g. 'at Burr School', 'at the Fire Department Headquarters', 'at the staircase to the Waban train station')

notes.description: Extractor remarks about anomalies in the source text; never carries data

source_text.description: Verbatim source clause, whitespace-collapsed, line-wrap fragments rejoined; the two subsection (c) entries that duplicate subsection (a) entries verbatim are prefixed '(c) ' to keep this column unique (see spec)
